name: Mellow Melon Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Cantaloupe, pared and seeded, cubed (about 2 lbs)
1/2 Honeydew, pared and seeded, cubed (about 2 lbs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Reserve a few melon cubes for garnish.
2. In the food processor or blender, puree cantaloupe, honeydew, wine, and cardamom in batches until smooth.
3. Chill the mixture until ready to serve.
4. At serving time, skim off any foam from the top of the soup.
5. Pour into soup bowls.
6. Garnish with melon pieces and chopped mint.
